### Mean metrics on ICCAD 2013 benchmark clips (toy litho, LithoBench-style reporting)

| Optimizer | Mean total $\mathcal{L}$ | Mean L2 (bin., 2048 x 2048) | Mean PVB (bin.) |
|-----------|------------------------------|---------------------------|-----------------|
| AdaGrad (lr=0.2) | 0.043691 | 0.040610 | 0.038516 |
| RMSprop (lr=0.2) | 0.040257 | 0.037160 | 0.038706 |
| Adam (lr=0.2) | 0.043011 | 0.039945 | 0.038323 |
| Learned L2O | 0.036977 | 0.033781 | 0.039949 |

Fixed **512** inner steps per optimizer on each clip; LR tuning uses **128** steps (see `--tune-steps`). Metrics: binarized resist/target at `eval_size` (see `--eval-size`).
